## PR Class

Choose one: `bugfix`, `feature`, `test-only`, `dependency/CI`, `docs/templates`, `large LSP enhancement`

## TDD Evidence

- [ ] I added or updated a failing test before production changes.
- [ ] I ran the targeted test and observed the expected failure.
- [ ] I implemented the minimal change to make the targeted test pass.
- [ ] I ran the targeted test again and it passed.
- [ ] Docs/templates/metadata-only change; explain below if checked.

## Checks

- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior.
- [ ] I ran the targeted tests for this PR class.
- [ ] I checked that no unexplained `skip` or `xfail` was added.
- [ ] I ran or explained the relevant PR-class validation commands.
- [ ] I reviewed the diff for unintended changes.

## AI-Native Review Notes

- Agent/tool used, if any:
- Files inspected first:
- New dependency or generated artifact impact:
- OpenQC alignment impact:

## Review Lanes

- [ ] Test coverage / CI gate reviewed.
- [ ] Correctness reviewed.
- [ ] Architecture / interface risk reviewed.
- [ ] Verification evidence reviewed.
- [ ] Merge strategy selected.

## Merge Gate

- [ ] Required CI jobs are green.
- [ ] The branch has no conflicts.
- [ ] No reviewer requested changes.
- [ ] Architecture status is not `BLOCK`.
- [ ] CI is current for the merge result.
